name: bash-commands
title: Bash Commands
description: A quick reference for bash commands with search, and categories.
author: koala1206

commands.name: search-bash-commands
commands.title: Search Bash Commands
commands.description: Quick access to bash commands. Search, filter by category, and copy.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
